source: user request 2026-05-08 — 'log everything... 1 md file having prompt that's gonna be reading every single thing'
title: Universal per-turn log to logs/turns.jsonl (both modes, all return paths)
what_failed: Conversation turns were durably logged only via Supabase L1 (raw_wiki). When offline or when L1 insertion failed, the turn was silently lost. Normie shortcut paths and exception paths in process_input were also potentially missed.
where_failed: pi_agent.py::process_input had multiple return statements scattered across mode-switch, command-handling, and god/normie/root dispatch — none of them touched a single canonical log.
why_likely: L1 was designed as a Supabase-only archive; no local mirror existed. Each return path was responsible for its own logging.
suggested_fix: Wrap process_input with a thin outer that ALWAYS appends one line to logs/turns.jsonl regardless of return path or exception, capturing duration_ms, mode, response preview, and error.
fix_applied: Renamed process_input -> _process_input_inner. Added new process_input that captures start_ts, calls inner inside try/except, and unconditionally calls agent.turn_log.append_turn. Created agent/turn_log.py with append_turn / count_today / recent_turns helpers, all best-effort and offline-safe.
tests: testing/test_turn_log.py — 10 passing tests including disk-failure non-raise, error-field capture, and exception-still-logs.
